## [00:00 - 00:29]

Hey, if you own a local business like a store or a restaurant or a chiropractors office or something like that and you want to get customers from the internet, go to CardoneCurrent.com forward slash class. There you can get a free on-demand training that shows you three very little known but extremely effective ways to get customers into your business from the internet. Once again, that's CardoneCurrent.com forward slash class. It's totally free and I hope you enjoy it. Thanks so much for watching. Take it easy.
